phase_notes.plan: Implement M4-003 only: generate benchmark_report.json from EvalRun rows, aggregate >=3 seed mean/SD/95% CI, include eval_set evidence and overlap check, handle COMPLETED/FAILED/SKIPPED_OPTIONAL target objects, compute/store report_sha256, recompute hash_status in GET APIs, and record CUDA/MLX parity PASS/FAIL/NA.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING, CONTEXT, M4 handoff, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE M4-003/API DTO sections, EVAL_SPEC report schema/hash/parity sections, ARCHITECTURE benchmark job/eval model sections, existing Benchmark/EvalRun models, benchmark_report schema, and M4-002 eval runner tests.
phase_notes.build: Implemented Benchmark DTOs/routes/service, report metric aggregation, canonical report hashing, schema validation, hash_status recompute, automatic report generation from terminal EvalRun rows, local_large skip reporting, and CUDA/MLX parity PASS/FAIL/NA calculation.
phase_notes.check: Passed task JSON, py_compile, focused benchmark report pytest, M4-002 eval runner regression, import boundary, file-size hard-limit, and diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: Implementation committed as 5c3d3e7; WORKING closeout prepared for push with this contract.
